3120210.name: Man Made
3120210.description:
After a long time Gregor returns to his Place of birth to start a new beginning.
The house he was born in is now uninhabitable and Gregor needs to make money as fast as possible to buy food and rebuild up the destroyed buildings on his farm.He is not alone on his journey, friends and family members help him to reach his goal.

Prove yourself as a farmer, hunter, fisherman, transport operator and house builder on a big enviroment map and overcome the small hurdles of everyday life.
3120210.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
